에베소서 6:1.content: Children, obey your parents in the Lord, for this is right.

에베소서 6:2.content: “Honor your father and mother,” which is the first commandment with a promise:

에베소서 6:3.content: “that it may be well with you, and you may live long on the earth.”

에베소서 6:4.content: You fathers, don’t provoke your children to wrath, but nurture them in the discipline and instruction of the Lord.

에베소서 6:5.content: Servants, be obedient to those who according to the flesh are your masters, with fear and trembling, in singleness of your heart, as to Christ,

에베소서 6:6.content: not in the way of service only when eyes are on you, as men pleasers, but as servants of Christ, doing the will of God from the heart,

에베소서 6:7.content: with good will doing service as to the Lord, and not to men,

에베소서 6:8.content: knowing that whatever good thing each one does, he will receive the same good again from the Lord, whether he is bound or free.

에베소서 6:9.content: You masters, do the same things to them, and give up threatening, knowing that he who is both their Master and yours is in heaven, and there is no partiality with him.

에베소서 6:10.content: Finally, be strong in the Lord, and in the strength of his might.

에베소서 6:11.content: Put on the whole armor of God, that you may be able to stand against the wiles of the devil.

에베소서 6:12.content: For our wrestling is not against flesh and blood, but against the principalities, against the powers, against the world’s rulers of the darkness of this age, and against the spiritual forces of wickedness in the heavenly places.

에베소서 6:13.content: Therefore put on the whole armor of God, that you may be able to withstand in the evil day, and having done all, to stand.

에베소서 6:14.content: Stand therefore, having the utility belt of truth buckled around your waist, and having put on the breastplate of righteousness,

에베소서 6:15.content: and having fitted your feet with the preparation of the Good News of peace,

에베소서 6:16.content: above all, taking up the shield of faith, with which you will be able to quench all the fiery darts of the evil one.

에베소서 6:17.content: And take the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of God;

에베소서 6:18.content: with all prayer and requests, praying at all times in the Spirit, and being watchful to this end in all perseverance and requests for all the saints:

에베소서 6:19.content: on my behalf, that utterance may be given to me in opening my mouth, to make known with boldness the mystery of the Good News,

에베소서 6:20.content: for which I am an ambassador in chains; that in it I may speak boldly, as I ought to speak.

에베소서 6:21.content: But that you also may know my affairs, how I am doing, Tychicus, the beloved brother and faithful servant in the Lord, will make known to you all things.

에베소서 6:22.content: I have sent him to you for this very purpose, that you may know our state and that he may comfort your hearts.

에베소서 6:23.content: Peace be to the brothers, and love with faith, from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

에베소서 6:24.content: Grace be with all those who love our Lord Jesus Christ with incorruptible love. Amen.
